query:
CREATE TABLE `appSettings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`settingKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`settingValue` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_settingKey_unique` UNIQUE(`settingKey`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute CREATE TABLE `appSettings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`settingKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`settingValue` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_settingKey_unique` UNIQUE(`settingKey`)
);
